query:
-- Spreads suspeitos: negativos, zerados ou muito extremos
SELECT codigoCetip, emissorNome, rating,
  ROUND(zspread*10000,0) as spread_bps,
  ROUND(taxaIndicativa*100,4) as taxa_pct,
  ROUND(durationAnos,2) as duration,
  ntnbReferencia,
  ROUND(ntnbTaxa*100,4) as ntnb_taxa_pct,
  CASE WHEN indexador LIKE '%IPCA%' THEN 'IPCA+' ELSE 'DI+' END as universo,
  isOutlier
FROM spread_analysis
WHERE zspread <= 0 OR zspread > 0.06
ORDER BY zspread DESC
LIMIT 20;

  ROUND(durationAnos,2) as duration,
  ntnbReferencia,
  ROUND(ntnbTaxa*100,4) as ntnb_taxa_pct,
  CASE WHEN indexador LIKE '%IPCA%' THEN 'IPCA+' ELSE 'DI+' END as universo,
  isOutlier
FROM spread_analysis
WHERE zspread <= 0 OR zspread > 0.06
ORDER BY zspread DESC
LIMIT 20;
